channel.title: Crew Member on WithinTrend — Part-Time Job Reviews & Guides

item.title: Working at McDonald's as a Crew Member: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: What's it really like working at McDonald's? Pay, hours, pros, cons, and tips from real employees.

item.title: Working at Trader Joe's as a Crew Member: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: What's it really like working at Trader Joe's? Pay, hours, pros, cons, and tips from real crew members.

item.title: Working at Chipotle as a Crew Member: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: What's it really like working at Chipotle? Pay, hours, pros, cons, and tips from real crew members.
